session.user: Run ruff format check on the modified files and report results: ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py
